name: Spotify Now Playing
description: Displays the cover art of the currently playing song on Spotify.
author: Tim

settings_schema.name: refresh_token
settings_schema.label: Refresh Token
settings_schema.info: Your Spotify Refresh Token. You can run get_refresh_token.py to get one.

settings_schema.name: show_progress_bar
settings_schema.label: Show Progress Bar
settings_schema.info: Toggle to display a dynamic progress bar at the bottom based on cover colors.

settings_schema.name: update_interval
settings_schema.label: Update Interval (seconds)
settings_schema.info: How often to poll Spotify for updates (seconds).
